title: Project Realism
description: Ever wanted to make Minecraft ULTRA-realistic?
body:
# Project Realism ⛏️

_**Have you ever wanted to play realistic Minecraft?**_

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/Uc0mAROJ9wU" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Main Features of the Modpack:
- Realistic Shader Pack
- Conquest Reforged Texture Pack
- Realistic Physics
- You can see your FEET!
- Realistic Structures and Terrain
- Super High Render Distance
- New Weapons!

## Shaders Settings(Complimentary Reimagined)


```
- Visual Style: Unbound
- Motion Blur: On
- Lens Flare: Sun Only
- World Blur: Depth of Field
- Generated Normals: Enabled
- World Outline: Enabled
- World Outline Thickness: 2
```

_Note: Any setting not included in this list is set at default_
